mapper.sql: select id, project_id, name, goal, status, start_date, end_date, completed_at, created_at, updated_at from iteration where deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into iteration (project_id, name, goal, status, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at) values (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{goal}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, now(), now())
mapper.update:
update iteration
name = #{name}, goal = #{goal}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = now()
where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update iteration set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from iteration where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
